raw.subject: Something I noticed about Nicole's Pet Services
raw.body:
Hi,

You're always open for business, but I noticed you don't have your own website yet - potential customers might find it hard to find and book your services.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that could showcase your services overview, photo gallery, and contact section, all in one place.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/nicole-s-pet-services-llc-clarksville

Would you like to discuss how a simple website could benefit your local business? I work with local businesses on a flat fee basis. Let's talk soon.
